metadata.description: Build complete messaging experiences right from your AI coding agent. Add transactional email, SMS, push, and web-push — welcome emails, OTPs, receipts, and more — then create templates, send, and monitor every message your app sends. One messaging layer, no provider lock-in.

plugins.name: senderkit
plugins.description: Add email, SMS, push, and web-push to your app and manage every message from your AI coding agent — one messaging layer, no provider lock-in.
